channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Moonshot Kimi-K3 tops Frontend Code Arena, beating Claude Fable 5
item.description: Open weights will be released on July 27.
item.content:encoded:
Open weights will be released on July 27.

Original source: https://arena.ai/code

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/hm2wuequ

  • Views: 3,306,808
  • Likes: 21,490

  • Quotes: 592
  • Replies: 2,117
  • Posts: 35

  • Thomas Wolf
  • Elon Musk
  • Christian Szegedy
  • Yi Ma
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)

item.title: Anthropic adds Claude Fable 5 to premium subscription plans
item.description: High-tier subscribers face a 50% standard usage limit.
item.content:encoded:
High-tier subscribers face a 50% standard usage limit.

Original source: https://support.claude.com/en/articles/15910845-claude-code-may-july-2026-weekly-limits-promotion

item.title: Moonshot AI releases Kimi K3 2.8T open-weights MoE model
item.description: The model features a native 1-million-token context window
item.content:encoded:
The model features a native 1-million-token context window

Original source: http://Kimi.com

item.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 tops Frontend Code Arena benchmark
item.description: Early evaluations indicate the model is highly token-hungry.
item.content:encoded:
Early evaluations indicate the model is highly token-hungry.

item.title: CMU Professor Ruslan Salakhutdinov highlights elite alumni across top AI labs
item.description: His former mentees founded Moonshot AI and joined OpenAI and xAI and Tesla
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Moonshot AI founder's departure sparks US AI immigration debate
item.description: David Pfau proposed automatic O-1 visas for ML PhDs.
item.content:encoded:
David Pfau proposed automatic O-1 visas for ML PhDs.

Original source: https://dhs.gov/news/2026/07/16/trump-administration-issues-final-rule-end-foreign-student-visa-abuse

item.title: UK AISI: Open-weight hacking gap shrinks to 4–7 months
item.description: GLM-5.2 matched the performance of Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.5.
item.content:encoded:
GLM-5.2 matched the performance of Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.5.

Original source: https://openai.com/daybreak/codex-security-plugin/#desktop-codex

item.title: OpenClaw's Peter Steinberger questions shift to graph-based agents
item.description: Engineers debate if graphs scale better than traditional loops.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Pieter Levels switches OpenCode workflow to Kimi K3 over safety blocks
item.description: Claude Code repeatedly blocked his emulator and health query tasks
item.content:encoded:
Claude Code repeatedly blocked his emulator and health query tasks

Original source: http://kimi.com/

item.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi K3 identifies itself as Anthropic's Claude
item.description: Pim de Witte shared screenshots of the identity error.
item.content:encoded:
